name: dbworkload

metadata.name: dbworkload
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU General Public License v3 or later (GPLv3+)

documentation:
# dbworkload - DBMS workload utility

Visit the [online documentation](https://dbworkload.github.io/dbworkload/).

modules.name: dbworkload.models.run
documentation: !/usr/bin/python

functions.name: dbworkload.models.run.signal_handler
documentation:
Handles Ctrl+C events gracefully,
ensuring all running processes are closed rather than killed.

Args:
    sig (_type_):
    frame (_type_):

functions.name: dbworkload.models.run.ramp_up
documentation: Start each process in the list sequentially respecting the interval between each process

functions.name: dbworkload.models.run.worker
documentation:
Process worker function to run the workload in a multiprocessing env

Args:
    thread_count (int): The number of threads to create
    q (mp.Queue): queue to report query metrics
    kill_q (mp.Queue): queue to handle stopping the worker
    log_level (str): log level to set the logger to
    conn_info (ConnInfo): connection data
    workload (object): workload class object
    args (dict): args to init the workload class
    iterations (int): count of workload iteration before returning
    duration_endtime (float): timestamp at which to stop and return
    conn_duration (int): seconds before restarting the database connection
    conc: (int): the total number of threads
    id_base_counter (int): the base counter to generate ID for each Process
    id (int): the ID of the thread
    driver (str): the friendly driver name

functions.name: dbworkload.models.run.run_transaction
documentation:
Execute the operation *op(conn)* retrying serialization failure.

If the database returns an error asking to retry the transaction, retry it
*max_retries* times before giving up (and propagate it).

modules.name: dbworkload.cli.main
documentation: !/usr/bin/python

modules.name: dbworkload.models.util
documentation: !/usr/bin/python

functions.name: dbworkload.models.util.util_csv
documentation:
Wrapper around SimpleFaker to create CSV datasets
given an input YAML data gen definition file

functions.name: dbworkload.models.util.util_yaml
documentation:
Wrapper around util function ddl_to_yaml() for
crafting a data gen definition YAML string from
CREATE TABLE statements.

modules.name: dbworkload.cli.dep
documentation: !/usr/bin/python

modules.name: dbworkload.cli.util
documentation: !/usr/bin/python

modules.name: dbworkload.utils.common
documentation: !/usr/bin/python

functions.name: dbworkload.utils.common.set_query_parameter
documentation:
convenience function to add a query parameter string such as '&application_name=myapp' to a url

Args:
    url (str]): The URL string
    param_name (str): the parameter to add
    param_value (str): the value of the parameter

Returns:
    str: the new URL with the added parameter

functions.name: dbworkload.utils.common.import_class_at_runtime
documentation:
Imports a class with the same name of the module capitalized.
Example: 'workloads/bank.py' returns class 'Bank' in module 'bank'

Args:
    path (string): the path of the module to import

Returns:
    class: the imported class

functions.name: dbworkload.utils.common.get_based_name_dir
documentation:
Return the directory name based on the filename

Args:
    filepath (str): the filepath, eg: /path/to/myfile.txt

Returns:
    str: the name of the directory, eg: /path/to/file

functions.name: dbworkload.utils.common.get_workload_load
documentation:
Get the data generation YAML string, as a Python dict object

Args:
    workload_path (str): the workload class filepath

Returns:
    (dict): the data gen definition

functions.name: dbworkload.utils.common.get_new_dburl
documentation:
Return the dburl with the database name replaced.

Args:
    dburl (str): the database connection string
    db_name (str): the new database name

Returns:
    str: the new connection string

functions.name: dbworkload.utils.common.ddl_to_yaml
documentation:
Transform a SQL DDL string of (multiple) CREATE TABLE statements
into a data generation definition YAML string

Args:
    ddl (str): CREATE TABLE statements

Returns:
    (str): the YAML data gen definition string

functions.name: dbworkload.utils.common.get_threads_per_proc
documentation:
Returns a list of threads count per procs

Args:
    procs (int): procs count
    threads (int): threads count

Returns:
    list: list of threads per procs

classes.name: dbworkload.utils.common.Stats

methods.name: dbworkload.utils.common.Stats.new_window
documentation: reset stats while keeping cumulative counts

methods.name: dbworkload.utils.common.Stats.calculate_stats
documentation: calculate the current stats this instance has collected.

Print workload stats
and export the stats as Prometheus endpoints

methods.name: dbworkload.utils.common.WorkerStats.new_window
documentation: reset stats while keeping cumulative counts

methods.name: dbworkload.utils.common.WorkerStats.add_latency_measurement
documentation: add one latency measurement in seconds

classes.name: dbworkload.utils.simplefaker.SimpleFaker

methods.name: dbworkload.utils.simplefaker.SimpleFaker.division_with_modulo
documentation:
Split a number into chunks.
Eg: total=10, divider=3 returns [3,3,4]

Args:
    total (int): The number to divide
    divider (int): the count of chunks

Returns:
    (list): the list of the individual chunks

methods.name: dbworkload.utils.simplefaker.SimpleFaker.generate
documentation:
Generate the CSV datasets

Args:
    load (dict): the data generation definition
    exec_threads (int): count of processes for parallel execution
    csv_dir (str): destination directory for the CSV files
    delimiter (str): field delimiter
    compression (str): the compression format (gzip, zip, None..)

methods.name: dbworkload.utils.simplefaker.SimpleFaker.get_simplefaker_objects
documentation:
Returns a list of SimpleFaker objects based on the number of execution threads.
Each SimpleFaker object in the list has its own seed number

Args:
    obj_type (str): the name of object to create
    args (dict): args required to create the SimpleFaker object
    count (int): count of rows to generate (for SimpleFaker.Sequence obj)
    exec_threads (int): count of parallel processes/threads used for data generation

Returns:
    list: a <exec_threads> long list of SimpleFaker objects of type <obj_type>

methods.name: dbworkload.utils.simplefaker.SimpleFaker.worker
documentation:
Process worker function to generate the data in a multiprocessing env

Args:
    generators (tuple): the SimpleFaker data gen objects
    iterations (int): count of rows to generate
    basename (str): the basename of the output csv file
    col_names (list): the csv column names, used for sorting
    sort_by (list): the column to sort by
    separator (str): the field delimiter in the CSV file
    compression (str): the compression format (gzip, zip, None..)

inner_classes.name: dbworkload.utils.simplefaker.SimpleFaker.Constant
documentation: Iterator always yields the same value.

inner_classes.name: dbworkload.utils.simplefaker.SimpleFaker.Sequence
documentation: Iterator that counts upward forever.

inner_classes.name: dbworkload.utils.simplefaker.SimpleFaker.UUIDv4
documentation: Iterator thar yields a UUIDv4

inner_classes.name: dbworkload.utils.simplefaker.SimpleFaker.Timestamp
documentation: Iterator that yields a Timestamp string

inner_classes.name: dbworkload.utils.simplefaker.SimpleFaker.Date
documentation: Iterator that yields a Date string

inner_classes.name: dbworkload.utils.simplefaker.SimpleFaker.Time
documentation: Iterator that yields a Time string

inner_classes.name: dbworkload.utils.simplefaker.SimpleFaker.String

methods.name: dbworkload.utils.simplefaker.SimpleFaker.String.__next__
documentation: generate random bytes and translate them to ascii
Iterator that yields a truly random string of ascii characters

inner_classes.name: dbworkload.utils.simplefaker.SimpleFaker.Json
documentation: Iterator that yields a simple json string

inner_classes.name: dbworkload.utils.simplefaker.SimpleFaker.Integer
documentation: Iterator that yields a random integer

inner_classes.name: dbworkload.utils.simplefaker.SimpleFaker.Bit
documentation: Iterator that yields random bits

inner_classes.name: dbworkload.utils.simplefaker.SimpleFaker.Bool
documentation: Iterator that yields a random boolean (0, 1)

inner_classes.name: dbworkload.utils.simplefaker.SimpleFaker.Float
documentation: Iterator that yields a random float number

inner_classes.name: dbworkload.utils.simplefaker.SimpleFaker.Bytes
documentation: Iterator that yields a random byte array

inner_classes.name: dbworkload.utils.simplefaker.SimpleFaker.Choice
documentation: Iterator that yields 1 item from a list

Pseudo-random data generator based on
the random.Random class.
